prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `15113be4`.
codex_response:
Implemented ARC2 task `15113be4`. The rule is: extract the non-`0/1/4` shape, treat it as a `2x`-upscaled mask, downscale it back to the underlying tile mask, then recolor those mask positions in every `3x3` tile whose corresponding cells are all `1`.

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as a starting point and rejected the sonnet summary’s “column copy” interpretation; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_15113be4/notes.md). No new shared primitive was needed. The generator matches the task family by building the fixed `23x23` separator grid, embedding one special-color `2x`-upscaled mask in a `2x2` tile block, and sampling binary `3x3` tiles so only a small number of them fully contain the mask and get recolored.

Verification/build status: official verifier passed `4/4`, the shared builder produced `1000` examples, `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 15113be4` passed `1000/1000`, and the generated preview sheet loaded with the expected structure.
